rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §254.125 governs campaign finance reporting procedures for political committees supporting or opposing candidates or measures. The provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no operational overlap.
quote: Sec. 254.125. FINAL REPORT OF COMMITTEE FOR SUPPORTING OR OPPOSING CANDIDATE OR MEASURE.
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses campaign finance reporting; the proposed change addresses property tax exemption thresholds. No intersection between the two provisions.
